caption: A person's hands hold a stack of sports trading cards against a background featuring a red and white logo. The top card in the stack is a Jimmy Butler card, featuring a large "M" logo for the Miami Heat. As the sequence progresses, the person uses their fingers to flip through the stack of cards from the top down. A vertical overlay on the right side of the scene shows a live chat feed and a small video window of a man with a beard wearing a black shirt. The chat feed contains messages from users "gwebo07" and "neglib", including the text "CSA the link for the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE >>> https://bit.ly/rezeX4X". Throughout the clip, the hands continue to shift and flip through the colorful edges of the cards in the stack.
